title: 2010-2015 Lexus RX350 RX450h Front Door Check Strap Replacement Instructions
description: Master Technician Viktor G shows the DIY how-to removal and installation procedure. This is the part that needs to be replaced if your door is making a clicking or popping noise when opening or closing. items.name: Automotive trim and clip removal kit
